description_long: This is a vintage-style arcade game cabinet featuring a bold, retro color scheme with diagonal stripes in pink, yellow, and navy blue, accented by a pair of checkered flags and a white racing helmet graphic on the side panels. The front of the cabinet displays a classic racing game on a screen set within a deep bezel, with a detailed dashboard area that includes a steering wheel and a pedal at the base, simulating a driving experience. The control panel is decorated with matching stripes and has a single-player layout, with a steering wheel and a few buttons. The cabinet is constructed primarily from wood or particleboard, with metal and plastic components for the controls and screen housing. The surface shows signs of wear and scuffing, adding to its authentic, well-used appearance. The back panel is plain and unadorned, while the overall structure is tall and boxy, designed to stand upright in public spaces.
description: A retro arcade game cabinet with racing-themed graphics, a steering wheel, and a pedal, featuring bold diagonal stripes and checkered flag artwork. The cabinet is tall, boxy, and shows signs of wear.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the bold diagonal stripes, checkered flag and helmet graphic, and the protruding control panel with a visible steering wheel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the racing game screen, control panel with steering wheel and buttons, coin slot, and pedal at the base.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with the same colorful stripes and racing motif, and a clear look at the steering wheel and pedal.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, dark panel with no graphics or interactive features.
attribute_screen_type: CRT, curved, medium-sized with a thick bezel and visible in-cabinet mounting typical of classic arcade machines.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with a central steering wheel, a few buttons to the right, and a pedal at the base; decorated with matching retro stripes.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present, with a blue background, white and yellow text, and racing-themed graphics matching the cabinet's overall style.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Diagonal stripes in pink, yellow, and navy blue, with a white racing helmet and checkered flags graphic; retro racing theme.
